title: JINMURY Frosted Arch Table Numbers for Wedding Reception, 10 Pack 5x7" Frosted Arch Acrylic Signs with Holder Acrylic Table Numbers 1-10, Perfect for Centerpiece Wedding Reception
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES 5 x 7 inch Frosted Acrylic with Frosted Acrylic Base, total 10 sets in one pack. Each acrylic piece has a protective film on both sides to prevent scratches and when you are ready to use, you need to remove it.

MINIMALIST DESIGN - These modern, minimalist acrylic table numbers are the perfect touch to add to your wedding. We love the clean, clean lines of these acrylic arch signs, they are beautiful wedding table decorations, perfect for displaying on a table top.

Premium quality: these frosted acrylic table numbers with holders are made from high quality frosted acrylic panels and then printed with white letters in a simple arc design that will not go out of style and last for a long time

SUITABLE FOR MANY OCCASIONS Our minimalist arch number plates are suitable for weddings, bridal showers, anniversaries, engagement parties, birthdays and any occasions and can be matched with any theme and used over and over again.
OUR QUALITY AND SERVICE If you are not satisfied with our frosted acrylic table numbers, please contact us directly. We will replace the product or refund you according to your choice.
